title: Drain - Natural Biome Changer
description: Adds Roots, which can change biome.
body:
![Main Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5113071ae17520be5e530f9d04e7a6bb1b0bd154_0.webp)
Made by MCreator.
# Disclaimer
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# About
Adds Roots, which can change biome.

# Blocks

## Root
![Root](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/add2baf3e3062e9d014678d345818fb1d34fd5a8.png)

Roots are blocks that can change biomes.
There are variants for different tree types.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f19e22c0e9ede1a0d7671e075602d46a37bd0d_0.webp)
Roots can be crafted using Sapling and Bonemeal.

![Bonemeal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b14bf17381fa8672e21100444af49d5e6a39d99e.png)
Using Bonemeal on placed Roots will change the biome to the corresponding forest.

This block remains unchanged unless you use Bonemeal, making it a cute addition to your building!
